prompt:
Please create a clean and practical fashion guide poster titled "Eyewear for Face Shape". Layout: Soft pink glittering background, clearly divided into rows by category, covering various combinations of [body parts and shapes] (e.g., face shapes: oval, round, square, heart, diamond; body types: hourglass, pear, apple, rectangle, inverted triangle; head shapes: oval, round, square; neck length: short, medium, long; shoulder types: narrow, wide, sloped). Each section includes reference illustrations for specific body part shapes, paired with simple line art icons of the most suitable [fashion item] styles and text labels. Include a "Highly Recommended" section and optionally a "To Avoid" section. Style: Minimalist design, neutral brown text, soft pastels, clear typography, directly generated image. Subject: "Fashion Guide Infographic for Eyewear Suited to Face Shape".

Body Part: Face Shape
Fashion Item: Eyewear
Aspect Ratio: 3:4
